name: hero_search
prompt: A warm editorial illustration evoking the essence of search algorithms. A vast library or archive with countless identical books arranged in perfect order on towering shelves. A single illuminated path cuts diagonally through the middle of the collection, representing binary search halving the space with each step, while a faint winding path traces through every shelf representing linear scan. Soft cream and parchment tones dominate, with amber light casting long shadows. Abstract geometric dividers split portions of the shelves, shrinking toward a glowing focal point. No text, no labels, no people. Atmospheric depth, editorial illustration style, warm cream background.
